HomeCareers
Careers

At Mackay Therapy and Rehabilitation, we’re dedicated to providing top-notch physiotherapy and rehabilitation services, and we’re always on the lookout for passionate individuals to join our team. 

If you have a heart for helping others and want to make a real difference in people’s lives, you’ve come to the right place.

Why Choose Us

We believe in creating a supportive and empowering work environment where our team members can thrive. We offer competitive salaries, opportunities for professional development, and a culture that values collaboration and innovation. 

Plus, you’ll have the chance to work alongside some of the best physiotherapists and rehabilitation specialists in the field.

Available Career Opportunities:

Take a look at the career opportunities that we have:

Physiotherapist

Are you a licensed physiotherapist with a passion for helping patients recover from injuries and improve their overall quality of life? 

Join our team and put your skills to work in a dynamic and rewarding environment.

Rehabilitation Specialist

Do you have experience working with patients who are recovering from surgery, illness, or injury? We’re looking for compassionate rehabilitation specialists who can help our patients regain strength, mobility, and independence.

Administrative Assistant
